source.description: Six-panel generated marker contact sheet saved under drafts/cartoon-paint-splat-doodle/ before cropping.
source.notes: Promoted after the owner specifically asked to backfill the unused splat drawing.

process_strategy: The contact sheet keeps one centered splat while building the blob guide, splat arms, droplets, thick outline, marker fills, and final cleanup in order.

final_elements.name: central blob guide
final_elements.description: A rounded middle blob that anchors the splat.

final_elements.name: uneven splat arms
final_elements.description: Pointed and rounded splat arms spreading from the center.

final_elements.name: small paint droplets
final_elements.description: A few separate small droplets around the main splat.

final_elements.name: thick black outline
final_elements.description: A bold marker outline around the main splat and droplets.

final_elements.name: bright marker fill
final_elements.description: Saturated marker color filling the already outlined splat and droplets.

final_elements.name: marker streaks and highlights
final_elements.description: Visible marker streak texture plus a few small highlight gaps.

final_elements.name: soft sticker shadow
final_elements.description: A small shadow behind the splat to lift it from the page.

frames.visible_job: Draws the central rounded blob guide that anchors the paint splat before any arms or droplets are added.
Adds uneven splat arms around the central blob.
Places separate small paint droplets around the main splat.
Thickens the existing splat and droplets with black marker.
Adds bright marker fill, streaks, highlight gaps, and a soft sticker shadow to existing shapes.

final_step.visible_job: Only reinforces the existing outline, cleans the marker fill, sharpens highlight gaps, and deepens the existing shadow.

rejection_checks: No splat arm, droplet, color fill, highlight, or shadow should first appear in the final image.
No frame may ink, color, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same splat scale, placement, and droplet arrangement as the step frames.
